auth.heroSubtitle: Patients can send an SOS in seconds. Health Officials get priority visibility, and Volunteers can support nearby incidents in real time.
auth.patientSosSubtitle: No account. One tap. Immediate alerting.
auth.featureVolunteer: Volunteers can opt in to support.
auth.responderAccessSubtitle: Register as a Health Official or Volunteer.
auth.accountOfficialHint: Primary responder: priority visibility and response controls.
auth.accountVolunteerHint: Support responder: assist nearby incidents when available.
auth.safetyHint: Safety: Sensitive response data is visible only to verified responders.

emergency.title: Send SOS
emergency.subtitle: Record a short clip or upload one. Health Officials are alerted first, Volunteers can support.
emergency.uploadHelp: Accepted: mp4, webm. Keep it short.
emergency.uploadRequiredError: Upload or record a 5-8 second clip first.
emergency.responseFlow: Response flow: Health Officials get priority visibility and controls. Volunteers can opt in to support.

questionnaire.title: Questionnaire
questionnaire.locationHelp: Required for responder matching. Health Officials see alerts first; Volunteers can opt in.
questionnaire.descriptionPlaceholder: Anything else that might help responders...
questionnaire.safety: Safety: call 112 if life-threatening or unsure.

guidance.stepsHelp: Tap any step (e.g., Step 8) then play that step only.
guidance.emergencySupportText: AI guidance is supplemental. Call 112 if life-threatening.
guidance.routingNote: Alert routing: Health Officials receive priority alerts; Volunteers can also respond to High/Critical cases.

responder.subtitle: Priority alerts for officials. Volunteers support nearby incidents in real time.
responder.refreshHint: Status updates refresh every few seconds.
responder.statusHintOfficial: Primary responder visibility and command access.
responder.statusHintVolunteer: Opt in to receive exact location matches.
responder.gpsHintOfficial: GPS location is used for priority routing. Keep it enabled for faster dispatch.
responder.gpsHintVolunteer: Set your location text to filter volunteer alerts. Exact match only.
responder.saveLocationSuccess: Saved. You will receive matching alerts.
responder.loginToSaveLocation: Login to save a responder location.
responder.safetyText: Do not approach if unsafe. Call 112 for life-threatening emergencies. Provide clear status updates.
responder.realtimeHint: Alerts refresh automatically. Official priority is always preserved.
responder.noAlerts: No matching alerts yet. Keep location active for faster routing.
responder.saveHint: Save your location above to see matching volunteer alerts.
responder.restrictedBody: Health Officials and Volunteers can access this console after signing in.
responder.volunteerOnlyError: Only volunteers need a text location.

chatbot.title: LifeLine AI Chat
chatbot.defaultAssistant: Ask me what to do. For emergencies in India, call 112 immediately.
chatbot.contextRequired: To get context-aware help, start an emergency and complete the questionnaire. Call 112 if life-threatening.
chatbot.safety: Safety: AI guidance is supplemental. Call 112 for emergencies in India.

audio.title: Audio Guidance
audio.subtitle: Play the selected step only (good for repeating step 8).
audio.unsupported: Speech Synthesis not supported in this browser.

voice.title: Voice Control
voice.subtitle: Toggle voice commands like "next step" or "step 8".
voice.unsupportedTitle: Speech recognition not supported in this browser

voiceGuidance.title: Voice Guidance (TTS)
voiceGuidance.subtitle: Plays AI voice script when available; otherwise reads steps.
voiceGuidance.safetyReminder: Safety reminder: If this is life-threatening or you are unsure, call emergency services in India: 112.

videoRecorder.unsupported: Recording not supported; use upload instead.

codes.email_exists: An account with this email already exists.
codes.unauthorized: You are not authorized for this action.
codes.volunteer_location_required: Location text is required for volunteer opt-in.
